title: Cold Tofu and Gazpacho Soup
description: A refreshing and light soup perfect for hot summer days. This recipe combines the creaminess of tofu with the flavors of gazpacho.
instructions: In a blender, combine the cubed tofu and gazpacho.
Blend the mixture on high speed until smooth.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Chill the soup in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes.
Serve the soup cold, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
